articles.description: SAN DIEGO, July 22, 2026 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- SOLV Energy, Inc. (“SOLV” or the “Company”) (Nasdaq: MWH) plans to report second quarter 2026 results on Thursday, August 13, 2026. Management will present results during a conference call at 8:30 a.m. Eastern time.
